# xui Provider

Manage [3x-ui](https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui/) (Xray panel) resources via the panel HTTP API and session cookies.

### Resources

| Resource | Description |
|---|---|
| `xui_inbound` | Xray inbound (port, protocol, settings, stream) |
| `xui_vless_client` | VLESS client on an existing inbound |
| `xui_xray_template` | Full Xray core JSON template |
| `xui_panel_settings` | Panel settings (web server, Telegram bot, subscriptions, etc.) |

### Data Sources

| Data Source | Description |
|---|---|
| `xui_inbound` | Read a single inbound by id |
| `xui_inbounds` | List all inbounds (optionally filtered by protocol) |

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "xui" {
  base_url             = "https://panel.example.com/your-random-path/"
  username             = var.xui_username
  password             = var.xui_password
  insecure_skip_verify = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `base_url` (String) Panel root URL including random path prefix, e.g. `https://host:port/<uuid>/`.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Panel login password.
- `username` (String) Panel login username.

### Optional

- `insecure_skip_verify` (Boolean) Skip TLS verification (e.g. self-signed panel certificate).
